goal: Compare dropout regularization strategies: standard dropout vs spatial dropout vs DropBlock on a simple CNN (3-layer) for CIFAR-10 classification. Use dropout rates 0.2 and 0.5. 3 seeds (42, 123, 456), 5 epochs, 2000 training samples. Paired t-test and Cohen's d for all comparisons.
direction: Compare dropout regularization strategies: standard dropout vs spatial dropout vs DropBlock on a simple CNN (3-layer) for CIFAR-10 classification. Use dropout rates 0.2 and 0.5. 3 seeds (42, 123, 456), 5 epochs, 2000 training samples. Paired t-test and Cohen's d for all comparisons.
